transcript.title: Opening
transcript.text: Good morning Rushil Bhatia. Here is your daily news for Tuesday, July 7. In today's briefing: top headlines, bhopal and madhya pradesh, business and markets, money, tax and personal finance, science and technology, development and policy, across india, around the world. Let's begin.

transcript.title: Top headlines
transcript.text: First, the stories leading the news this morning. Mikel Merino strikes late as Spain edge past Portugal to reach WC quarter-finals. Spain edged past Portugal with a crucial one-nil win in a gripping World Cup encounter. Mikel Merino struck the decisive goal in stoppage time, leaving Portugal eliminated and signaling the end of Cristiano Ronaldo's illustrious World Cup journey. Unai Simon's outstanding performance as goalkeeper kept Spain's net intact, propelling La Roja into the quarterfinals for the first time since 2010. Government got 'Satluj' pulled off OTT on security grounds. The government asked ZEE5 to remove the film 'Satluj' citing security concerns. This action followed the movie's release on the OTT platform after a long delay. The film depicts the story of activist Jaswant Singh Khalra and his disappearance. Its makers released the movie on ZEE5 with a new name after censor objections. E20 fuel may damage rubber parts in E10 cars, said unpublished report. An ARAI report noted rubber part deterioration in E10 vehicles using E20 fuel. Metallic components showed no adverse impact, and emissions remained within legislative limits. One BS-VI turbocharged engine experienced issues after durability testing, unlike a BS-IV engine. Two-wheeler engine durability tests showed acceptable performance with E20 fuel. 'Integral part of India': Diplomat protests wrong depiction of J and K at Dhaka seminar. India lodged a protest at a Dhaka seminar after a map showed Kashmir as part of Pakistan. An Indian diplomat immediately raised objections during the presentation by a former ambassador. The diplomat stated that Jammu and Kashmir is an integral part of India. The former ambassador claimed the map was for representational purposes only. Microsoft layoffs: Company cuts 4,800 jobs; to reduce 2.1 percent global workforce. Microsoft has laid off 4,800 employees, about 2.1 percent of its global workforce, as its new fiscal year begins, with Xbox and commercial sales taking the biggest hits. HR chief Amy Coleman told employees the business is changing because the industry around it is changing, insisting AI isn't replacing these roles. Xbox alone loses 1,600 jobs now, with 3,200 more planned this year as CEO Asha Sharma resets the gaming division. 'Resigned judge' can't be impeached, say constitutional experts. Parliament will table an inquiry report on former judge Yashwant Varma's removal. Justice Varma resigned in April after facing allegations of unaccounted money. Constitutional experts state impeachment proceedings are now pointless after his resignation. They emphasize a judge ceases to hold office upon resignation, not requiring acceptance. Weeks before Alexander Wang's AI update tease, Google 'messaged' Meta. Google capped Meta's use of Gemini AI models around March 2026 after Meta sought more computing capacity than Google could provide. The restriction disrupted Meta's internal AI projects and forced employees to ration AI tokens. It came weeks before Meta AI chief Alexandr Wang announced a Muse Spark update aimed at cutting the company's dependence on rival models for coding and agentic tasks. Saudi Arabia effects deepest crude price cut in 26 years. Saudi Arabia significantly reduced crude oil prices, reflecting intense competition among producers. Major Persian Gulf nations are increasing their oil output, restoring pre-war export levels. This move coincides with OPEC+ allies agreeing to further boost production targets for August. Lower oil prices and increased supply will benefit Indian refiners and reduce government subsidy burdens. NIA charges LeT chief Hafiz Saeed with plotting Pahalgam terror strike. The National Investigation Agency has charged Hafiz Saeed for the Pahalgam attack. This attack tragically killed twenty-five tourists and one local resident. Evidence includes digital trails and on-ground examination by the agency. Saeed, LeT chief, faces charges under new Indian penal codes. Jamie Dimon gives a 'reality check' to Canada's PM Mark Carney on his unity call to Europe. JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon has dismissed Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney's call for middle powers to unite, calling it a "fantasy." Dimon pointed to Europe's economic struggles as an example of cooperation's limitations, citing high taxes and regulation. He emphasized that attractive business environments are crucial for growth, contrasting Europe's declining competitiveness with the U.S. market. Dimon also reassured investors about America's investment appeal, noting China's evolving global approach. Taj Mahal originally temple? HC seeks response of Centre, ASI on inspection plea. Prayagraj: The Allahabad high court on Monday directed the central govt and the Archaeological Survey of India (ASI) to file their counter-affidavits in response to a petition challenging an Agra court order that refused to allow a survey of the Taj Mahal.

transcript.title: Bhopal and Madhya Pradesh
transcript.text: Now, news closer to home in Bhopal and across Madhya Pradesh. ED Files PC Against Ex-NCL CMD In PMLA Case. The investigation further revealed that rupees 50 lakh received from a third party was utilised, along with other funds, to purchase a residential flat at SAIL City, Ranchi, thereby presenting it as untainted property. Road Safety: 128 Buses Found With Blocked Emergency Exits. Police have forwarded proposals to the Transport Department regarding the fitness of the buses found violating the norms. Mangubhai To Be 5th Governor To Remain In Office Even After 5 Years. Mangubhai Patel, who comes from Gujarat, is close to Prime Minister Narendra Modi. BJP To Send Single Name Of Narottam For Datia By-Poll. The Congress has constituted a panel consisting of three names for the Datia Vidhan Sabha by-election and sent it to the party high command. Honda Old Generation Goldwing Tour 2023 Price in Bhopal. Reti Mandi Bridge partly opens amid rains. While one arm of the bridge has been opened, the Datt Nagar-side approach remains incomplete and is expected to take another four months to become operational. MP to implement UCC this month, says CM Yadav. MP to Develop Smart Industrial Park in Bhopal; CM Mohan Yadav to Lay Foundation Stone. Provided Equipment For Advertising Inducement For Religious Conversion: Madhya Pradesh High Court Upholds . An Assessment of the "TB Mukt Gram Panchayat" Initiative in Northeastern Madhya Pradesh, India. Rivers In Spate In Madhya Pradesh: Earthmover Among Vehicles Washed Away In Balaghat. Man booked for rape on marriage pretext. Bhopal to replace 37 vehicle checks with 12 checkpoints. Gang behind ATM theft used master key, shutter trick. HC upholds dismissal of Rewa constable despite acquittal in criminal case. RGPV paper theft: Probe panel fails to submit report on time. Milkman dies in Misrod road crash. Trial Court Can't Place Entire Burden Of Proving Husband's Income On Wife: High Court. After hearing the submissions in part, the larger bench adjourned the matter for further arguments.

transcript.title: Business and markets
transcript.text: Moving to business, the economy and the markets. Stock recommendations for 7 July from MarketSmith India. MarketSmith India reveals its top stock recommendations for today, 7 July. Get expert insights into the best-performing stocks to guide your investment decisions. Gold, silver prices today: Comex gold tops $4,200, silver nears $64 as recovery rally extends; Fed minutes in focus. Gold and silver prices saw mild gains on 6 July, supported by easing concerns over a US Federal Reserve rate hike and a weakened US dollar. Gold futures rose to $4,215, and silver to $63.73, marking a recovery from prior losses. Trent Q1 business update: Revenue grows 19 percent , store network expands. Tata Group's Trent reported a 19 percent YoY revenue growth to rupees 5,666 crore for the June quarter. The company expanded its retail presence, with a total of 1,312 outlets. Trent's share rebounded strongly after a significant decline, up 17.2 percent in 2026 but still off its record high. Rentomojo gets SEBI nod for raising funds through IPO launch. Details here. Furniture rental startup Rentomojo has received SEBI observations for its IPO, primarily an offer for sale by existing shareholders. The IPO aims to raise up to rupees 150 crore for expansion and debt repayment. Rentomojo holds a significant market share in India's online rental segment. Q1FY27 IT earnings preview: Brokerages see mixed quarter as AI, macro headwinds weigh on growth. The June-quarter earnings season begins amid muted expectations for tech companies due to macroeconomic uncertainty and AI disruptions. Analysts foresee weaker Q1 FY27 growth, with a focus on guidance and demand outlook amid geopolitical tensions affecting performance. Wall Street: S and P 500, Nasdaq surge as chip stocks rebound, Broadcom jumps 5.7 percent , Micron adds 2.8 percent. At 10:18 a.m. ET, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 0.28 percent , the S and P 500 gained 0.52 percent , the Nasdaq Composite gained 1.10 percent US stock market today: S and P, Nasdaq futures jump up to 1 percent as tech stocks recover; crude oil extends decline. US stock futures rose, led by gains in tech shares and falling crude prices. Nasdaq 100 futures rose 1 percent , while the Dow remained stable. Investors await critical Federal Reserve meeting minutes and earnings reports from major companies, including Delta Air Lines and PepsiCo. Ather Energy Is said to plan $200 million India share sale. The electric two-wheeler maker has appointed HSBC Holdings Plc, Axis Capital Ltd. and Nomura Holdings Inc. to manage the qualified institutional placement Crude oil retreats, but India's fuel bills stay up. China has reduced fuel prices, mirroring pre-war levels as crude oil costs decline. Top Gainers and Losers on 6 July: Swan Corp, Zen Tech, HFCL, HDFC Bank, Thermax, Hitachi Energy among top gainers. Indian stock markets rose on July 6, with benchmark indices gaining over 0.60 percent . The Nifty 50 closed 0.66 percent higher at 24,420, while Sensex advanced 0.67 percent to 78,236. HDFC Bank and Axis Bank drove gains, while Nifty Realty led sectoral increases with a 2 percent rise. BPCL bets on retail offerings, EV charging network. Bharat Petroleum Corporation Ltd is investing significantly to expand its retail offerings. Stock market today: Sensex jumps 500 points, Nifty 50 closes above 24,400; investors earn rupees 2 lakh crore in a day. The Sensex ended 521 points, or 0.67 percent , higher at 78,285, while the Nifty 50 closed at 24,430, up 160 points, or 0.66 percent . The mid and small-cap segments also rose. The Nifty Midcap 100 and Smallcap 100 indices gained 0.45 percent and 0.75 percent , respectively. Reliance gets Sebi warning over employee trades. Sebi issued an administrative warning to Reliance Industries after finding two employees and a relative traded while possessing unpublished price-sensitive information. Ashish Kacholia, Madhusudan Kela lead ace investors' comeback after March rout. The median portfolio of ace investors, those with holdings of more than rupees 1,000 crore each, likely stood at 18.7 percent in the June quarter, compared with a median fall of 15.6 percent in the March quarter. PIL seeks ethanol blend disclosure at fuel pumps. A Supreme Court petition demands transparency in ethanol-blended petrol distribution. Asian Paints declares board meeting date to announce Q1 results 2026. Asian Paints Ltd. 's board of directors will meet on July 29, 2026, to review and approve the audited financial results for the quarter ended 30 June 2026. Mumbai Weather July 7: IMD issues orange alert. Mumbai Weather July 7: Mumbai is under an Orange Alert for heavy rainfall and strong gusty winds on July 7. Sobha sets decent base for FY27 with record Q1 bookings. Sobha's Q1FY27 bookings hit a record rupees 3,656 crore, up over 70 percent sequentially and year-on-year, driven by strong response to its Hoskote luxury launch. The company is targeting 30 percent sales growth for the full year, even as rising supply and AI-linked job uncertainty pose watch-points ahead. Ram temple row: SIT finds repeated cash theft. A Special Investigation Team found employees allegedly concealing cash during donation counting. El Nino remains an important variable to watch; earnings recovery likely in H2FY27: Dharmesh Kakkad of ICICI Pru AMC. Dharmesh Kakkad of ICICI Prudential AMC shares crucial insights on the impact of El Nino on India's monsoon and discusses macroeconomic factors influencing market volatility. Ram Mandir says rupees 2,370 cr spent on temple. The Shri Ram Janmabhoomi Teerth Kshetra Trust reported receiving rupees 3,264 crore in donations and spending rupees 2,370 crore on construction. 75 percent returns in YTD! Indiabulls share price hits a fresh 52-week high. Indiabulls share price has delivered strong returns over a period time. The smallcap stock has gained 30 percent in one month and has delivered multibagger returns of 180 percent in three months. Indiabulls shares have jumped 104 percent in six months, while it has surged over 75 percent on a YTD basis. Your mobile bills may go up by another 12-15 percent soon. Get ready for another telecom tariff hike, with prices expected to rise by 12-15 percent in the next three to four months. Knack Packaging IPO allotment date today. GMP, steps to check share allotment status online on BSE, NSE and MUFG Intime. Knack Packaging IPO allotment date is likely today, 6 July 2026. Investors can check Knack Packaging IPO allotment status online through the websites of BSE and NSE, along with the official portal of the IPO registrar. MUFG Intime India is the Knack Packaging IPO registrar. Putin, Zelensky want to end war, says Donald Trump. Donald Trump stated both leaders desire an end to the ongoing Ukraine conflict. Kusumgar IPO GMP signals 41 percent listing pop: 10 key things to know from the RHP ahead of offer launch on Wednesday, 8 July. As Kusumgar prepares for its IPO launch on July 8, the grey market hints at a promising 41 percent premium. With insights from its Red Herring Prospectus, discover vital information about the company's operations and financials. Microsoft cuts 4,800 job as it revamps Xbox. Microsoft said Monday it was eliminating about 4,800 jobs -- roughly two percent of its global workforce -- in a cost-cutting move that will deliver a sweeping restructuring of its struggling Xbox gaming division.

transcript.title: Money, tax and personal finance
transcript.text: Now to your money — taxes, savings and personal finance. From cash receipts to property deals: 8 key income tax limits every taxpayer should know to avoid penalties. New rules under the Income Tax Act 2025 are set to curb tax evasion by limiting cash transactions. Individuals cannot receive over rupees 2 lakh in cash from one person daily. Loans, deposits, and repayments exceeding rupees 20,000 must be cashless. Social Security: SSA retirement benefit checks due this week on 8 July , See who is eligible, amount and full schedule. July 8 social security distribution: The checks will be doled on pre-determined days this month based on your birth date. The benefit differs by retirement age, with up to $5,181 for those who delay claims until 70. Here's a look at the payment schedule... ITR utility updated: New 'other income' column added under exempt income schedule; here's what it means. Income Tax Return (ITR) filing for the assessment year 2026-2027 sees a significant update with a new 'Other Income' column under the Exempt Income Schedule. This allows taxpayers to voluntarily disclose non-taxable receipts that don't fit specific categories, like rural agricultural land sales or gifts from relatives. Experts advise this proactive reporting to prevent potential tax notices and mismatches with departmental records, especially for substantial transactions. Kisan Vikas Patra interest rate for July-Sept quarter announced, investment to double in 115 months: Details here. At the current interest rate of 7.5 percent , the invested amount doubles after 115 months, or 9 years and 7 months. Although the investment remains locked in until maturity, premature closure is allowed under specific conditions. Want rupees 50,000 every quarter from SCSS? Check how much you need to invest. Senior citizens can now secure a steady income with the Senior Citizens' Savings Scheme (SCSS), which offers an attractive 8.2 percent interest rate. To generate approximately rupees 50,000 quarterly, an investment of around rupees 24.40 lakh is required. EPF versus VPF under new EPF Scheme 2026: Here's how employee and employer contributions will work. EPFO: The EPF 2026 Scheme largely retains existing EPF contribution rules, with both employees and employers continuing to contribute 12 percent of wages, subject to the statutory wage ceiling. It also preserves the VPF framework, allowing employees to make higher voluntary contributions without requiring employers to match them, while offering flexibility to discontinue them later. 'Invest to beat inflation': Management consultant breaks down his strategy for young investors , Here's how. A management consultant has shared his investment strategy on Instagram aimed at young investors. Here's a look at how he divides his savings into long-term, medium-term, and emergency fund to achieve financial growth. Employee denied salary for more than three years due to pending disciplinary case; he fights and wins in Odisha HC; court directs state govt to release dues. The Odisha High Court has ordered the state government to release pending salary for an employee denied wages for over three years due to a stalled disciplinary case. The court emphasized the right to livelihood under Article 21, stating that withholding salary infringes upon basic human dignity. This landmark ruling ensures the employee receives dues, while the disciplinary proceedings continue separately. Income-tax returns: What is assisted filing, who are authorised representatives, eligibility and factors explained. Income-tax returns: Today we explain what ITR assisted filing is, who is allowed to assist, who is considered authorised representative, the requirements and eligibility criteria and other important factors. 8th Pay Commission latest news: Odisha meetings, Railway inspection plan and other key developments you should know. The 8th Pay Commission is actively consulting stakeholders across India, recently holding discussions in Bhubaneswar and planning for Kolkata. Notably, the commission intends to conduct firsthand inspections of Indian Railways' operations, including track maintenance, signal work, and train control, to better understand employee working conditions and risks before salary revisions. Railway technical supervisors are advocating for broader operational inspections to ensure a comprehensive review. rupees 14.65 lakh salary? Here's how you can legally reduce your income tax liability to zero under new tax regime. A rupees 14.65 lakh CTC does not necessarily mean you have to pay income tax under the new tax regime. With the right salary structure, employer contributions to EPF and NPS, and the standard deduction, your taxable income can be brought down to rupees 11.99 lakh, making you eligible for zero tax liability. Gold rate today (July 6, 2026): Check 24k, 22k, 20k and 18k gold jewellery prices from Joyalukkas, Malabar Gold and Diamonds, Tanishq and IBJA in Delhi, Mumbai, Hyderabad, other cities. Gold prices saw a slight dip today, July 6, 2026, Check 22k jewellery rates at major retailers like Tanishq, Malabar Gold and Diamonds, Kalyan Jewellers, and Joyalukkas. Consumers are advised to check the latest rates before purchasing. Mutual funds holding cash: Is high cash balance a red flag for investors? Experts explain. Experts suggest that cash holdings should be viewed as a portfolio management tool rather than a buy-or-sell signal. A fund's investment philosophy, portfolio quality, and long-term performance remain far more important than a single percentage shown in the monthly factsheet. EPS 2026 versus EPS-95: Key changes in minimum pension, eligibility and contributions explained. The Employees' Pension Scheme (EPS), 2026 has replaced EPS-1995 and the Employees' Family Pension Scheme, 1971 under the Social Security Code, 2020. Despite the new scheme, the minimum monthly EPS pension remains unchanged at rupees 1,000, the same as since September 1, 2014. EPF versus Labour Codes: If basic pay must be 50 percent , why is PF capped at rupees 1,800?. Payroll rules are changing in India as EPF versus labour codes reshape salary structures and PF calculations. While basic pay norms rise, EPF contributions remain capped at rupees 1,800, impacting take-home pay and retirement planning choices. Man sells property for rupees 48 lakh, constructs a new house but faces delay, income tax dept denies Section 54 claim; he fights and wins case in ITAT Chennai. A Chennai resident successfully reclaimed his Section 54 tax exemption after a three-year construction delay on his new home, initially denied by the tax department. The Income Tax Appellate Tribunal (ITAT) ruled in his favour, citing the COVID-19 pandemic as an extraordinary circumstance beyond his control. The tribunal emphasized a liberal interpretation of the beneficial provision, allowing the exemption despite minor delays in finalising construction. Are super top-up plans becoming redundant?. While stacking policies was once the ultimate cost-saving hack for medical emergencies, a shifting market has quietly changed the math for policyholders. This SGB delivers 190 percent return on premature redemption date: Gold bond turns rupees 1 lakh investment into rupees 2.90 lakh. Sovereign Gold Bond (SGB) 2020-21 Series-IX investors can now redeem their bonds prematurely from July 4, 2026. The Reserve Bank of India has fixed the premature redemption price at rupees 14,366 per unit, reflecting a significant 190.22 percent return on the initial investment. 8th pay commission: Visits to Bhubaneswar, Kolkata this week, plans for Railway workers meet in Mumbai , Latest updates. The 8th pay commission has multiple state visits and other meetings scheduled in July 2026, with plans for more consultations with employee groups, unions and stakeholders across states and union territories in due course. 8th Pay Commission: 65 percent salary hike? How higher HRA, TA and DA merger could raise a Level 1 employee's salary. ​Several organisations representing central government employees and pensioners have urged the 8th Pay Commission to revise HRA, transport allowance, family unit norms and dearness allowance. ​ Bank holidays in July: SBI, HDFC, ICICI to be closed for 12 days this month; Check full RBI calendar here. Buying health insurance? One overlooked document can tell you what brochures won't. Irdai-mandated product-wise NL-47 disclosures reveal claim settlement, complaint rates, renewals and more, helping buyers compare health insurance plans beyond brochures and marketing claims. DA merger demands: Does salary structure and Dearness Allowance change? Here's what Finance Ministry said on the issue. Employee groups are demanding merger of Dearness Allowance with basic pay to increase monthly salary. Here's what the Finance Ministry has clarified about higher basic pay, changes to salary structure and DA... Gold drops 30 percent , silver plunges 54 percent , but history shows 2026 correction isn't the deepest yet. Gold and silver have fallen sharply from their record highs in 2026, with gold down about 30 percent and silver by 54 percent . However, historical cycles show the current declines are not the deepest, and the time correction is still pending. Bank holiday today: Are banks open or closed today (Monday, July 6, 2026) in your state?. Bank holiday today: Banks will remain closed in select states on July 6, due to regional observances, while they will function as usual in the rest of the country. Here's a look at where banks are closed today and the reason behind the holidays. EPFO's rupees 1,800 EPF contribution cap explained: Who benefits more – employees or employers?. The EPF Scheme, 2026 introduces clearer guidelines on provident fund contributions, capping mandatory payments at rupees 1,800 monthly. While employees benefit from increased take-home pay and flexibility, they may risk a smaller retirement fund if they don't opt for additional voluntary contributions.

transcript.title: Science and technology
transcript.text: Next, science and technology. Apple could bring back its iPhone X playbook for the iPhone Ultra. Apple could be planning to use the iPhone X playbook with the iPhone Ultra by delaying the initial pre-sales and orders for the foldable iPhone. New AI agent can hack systems and deploy ransomware without human help. A new report reveals that AI agents can autonomously execute ransomware attacks, evidenced by the case of JADEPUFFER, which exploited a critical vulnerability to infiltrate systems. iOS 27 beta 2 leak reveals new clue about Apple's camera-equipped AirPods: Here's what we know. Apple could be teasing a new AirPods Pro with cameras with the latest beta version of iOS 27 beta. WhatsApp usernames: Will they make India's digital conversations safer or less trustworthy? Experts weigh in. As digital platforms evolve in India, the way people identify themselves online is clearly changing too. WhatsApp's move towards usernames is more than a feature update. WhatsApp username row: Zoho's Arattai to disable username feature. Zoho's Arattai will remove its username-based account feature after the regulatory challenges faced by WhatsApp. Meta spent billions on AI, but Zuckerberg says progress has been slower than expected: Report. Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg acknowledged the shortcomings of the company's recent restructuring and the slow development of AI agents. WhatsApp issues username FAQs amid govt scrutiny, Can someone find you with it? Could you be impersonated? Check details. Meta Platforms' messaging app WhatsApp has released detailed set of frequently asked questions (FAQs) for users on its new username feature following controversy over safety and security of the rollout. Oppo Reno 16, Reno 16c launched in India: Check price, specs and more. Oppo launched the Reno 16 series featuring Snapdragon processors and AMOLED displays. Prices in India start at rupees 46,999 for the Reno 16c and rupees 61,999 for the Reno 16 Meta plans to rent AI computing power as it takes on AWS, Google Cloud: Report. Meta is developing a cloud infrastructure to sell AI computing access, competing with AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud. WhatsApp usernames could open the platform to impersonations and scams, warn cybersecurity experts: Here is how. Meta's WhatsApp is launching usernames for privacy, enabling users to interact without disclosing phone numbers. While this can protect user identity, experts warn of risks like impersonation and scams, highlighting the necessity for robust anti-abuse measures to ensure safety amid these changes. Key details about iPhone 18 Pro leak online after hackers gain access to 630 GB data from Tata Electronics. Leaks from Tata Electronics reveal details about Apple's upcoming iPhone 18 Pro, including component suppliers and internal documents after a ransomware attack. This breach, involving over 200,000 files, threatens Apple's supplier relationships and business strategy ahead of the September launch. Samsung Galaxy A27 5G debuts in India with 120Hz AMOLED display, price starts at rupees 28,999. Samsung Galaxy A27 5G features a 6.7-inch Full HD+ Super AMOLED display, Snapdragon 6 Gen 3 chipset, 50MP triple rear camera, and 5,000mAh battery. OnePlus N6 5G launched in India with 8,000mAh battery, Dimensity 6360 Apex processor: Check price and specs. The OnePlus N6 features a 6.75-inch HD display, MediaTek Dimensity 6360 Apex processor, 8,000mAh battery, and military-grade durability. WhatsApp to let users reserve usernames from next week: Here's how it works. WhatsApp introduces a username system to eliminate the need to share your phone number. The company will allow users to select their usernames starting next week. WhatsApp to let users chat without sharing phone numbers: Username feature coming soon. WhatsApp, which says it has more than 3 billion users globally, has until now allowed users to be contacted by anyone who has their phone number. Will iPhone 17 Pro Max cost nearly rupees 2 lakh in India? Leak suggests so. The iPhone 17 Pro, currently priced at rupees 1,34,900, could reportedly retail between rupees 1,54,900 and rupees 1,69,900. The iPhone 17 Pro Max may be priced between rupees 1,84,900 and rupees 1,99,900, compared with its current price of rupees 1,49,900. Samsung Galaxy M47 5G launched in India with 6,000mAh battery, 50MP OIS camera. Samsung has launched the Galaxy M47 5G in India with a price of rupees 22,999. The phone features a Snapdragon 6 Gen 3 chipset, 6.7-inch AMOLED display, 6,000mAh battery, and a 50MP camera. Apple prepares smart glasses to take on Meta, launch tipped for next year. Apple is eyeing the smart glasses market, potentially releasing its first model next year. Apple could be looking to leverage its strong ecosystem to bring in buyers, a report claims iPhone 18 Pro launch date, expected price, processor and camera upgrades. Leaks suggest Apple's iPhone 18 Pro lineup may launch on September 8 or 9. The phone is expected to see a price of around $1,200-$1,300 iPhone 18 Pro, iPhone 18 Pro Max could see up to $200 price hike, says report. Apple could raise the prices for the upcoming iPhone 18 Pro models by up to $200. The iPhone 18 Pro could be priced at $1,200-$1,300, if the new report is to be believed Mint Explainer: Why quantum computing is the next geopolitical race. With multi-billion dollar investments and new US executive orders targeting a 2028 breakthrough, global powers are rushing to secure hardware superiority before 'Q-Day' upends modern encryption. Flipkart GOAT Sale: iPhone 17 gets rupees 12,000 discount, Pro models cheaper by up to rupees 22,000. Flipkart's GOAT Sale is beginning from July 4 with discounts on various products including the iPhone 17 series. The iPhone 17 will be priced at rupees 70,900, the iPhone 17 Pro at rupees 1,12,900, and the iPhone 17 Pro Max at rupees 1,27,900 Google limits Meta's use of its Gemini AI models: Report. Google has limited Meta's access to its Gemini AI models due to high demand. This has disrupted Meta's internal AI projects and affected other Google clients. Despite growing Google Cloud revenue, computing power constraints hindered further growth in the sector.

transcript.title: Development and policy
transcript.text: Now to development, infrastructure and government policy. BlogDescription. Indian Navy will commission 6th Project 17A indigenous stealth frigate, Mahendragiri (F38) on July 11. Suzuki signs MoU for compressed biogas plant in Assam, India. "Don't turn our cars into scrap": Protesters slam E20 policy. NTPC REL seeks contractor for 300 MW/1,200 MWh storage project in India. Green bet: Can India-Japan partnership help make biogas work in rural India?. Could India's geothermal potential be unlocked by homegrown technology?. Anand Mahindra Says India Can Emerge as World's 'Connector Economy'. SEZ 2.0 Explained: Why India Is Rethinking a 20-Year-Old Policy. PM Modi arrives in Indonesia to further strengthen India's Act East Policy.

transcript.title: Across India
transcript.text: Turning to the big national stories. Indian diplomat protests wrong depiction of J and K at Dhaka seminar. India lodged a protest at a Dhaka seminar after a map showed Kashmir as part of Pakistan. An Indian diplomat immediately raised objections during the presentation by a former ambassador. The diplomat stated that Jammu and Kashmir is an integral part of India. The former ambassador claimed the map was for representational purposes only. 2 Assam Rifles personnel killed in Manipur ambush. Two Assam Rifles personnel died after suspected militants ambushed their vehicle. The attack occurred on NH-202 in Manipur's Ukhrul district on Monday afternoon. Security forces responded quickly and engaged in an exchange of fire with the assailants. Further operations are currently underway to apprehend the individuals responsible for the incident. Nabin's simplicity reflects BJP's values, says Modi. Prime Minister Narendra Modi publicly supported BJP president Nitin Nabin. He highlighted Nabin's simplicity as a source of pride for party members. This defense followed mocking remarks from Telangana CM Revanth Reddy and Arvind Kejriwal. Nabin, a former Bihar MLA, faced criticism for his relative lack of national recognition. PM: Mookerjee ensured Bengal remained integral part of India. Prime Minister Narendra Modi honored Syama Prasad Mookerjee's legacy in Kolkata. He highlighted Mookerjee's efforts to keep Bengal united with India during partition. Mookerjee's industrial vision established key national institutions for economic strength. The Prime Minister noted Mookerjee's opposition to separate constitutions and flags. Defence, critical minerals on agenda as Modi arrives in Indonesia. Prime Minister Modi began a three-nation tour in Jakarta, Indonesia. He will meet President Prabowo Subianto for bilateral cooperation talks. Discussions will cover trade, defense, and critical minerals like nickel. The visit aims to deepen civilizational ties and people-to-people connections. Bengal girl was ga﻿ng-raped, brutalised, shows autopsy. A 12-year-old girl was sexually abused and brutally murdered in Baruipur. Her body was found in a local pond after she was dumped alive. The autopsy report indicated horrific injuries and suffocation as the cause of death. Police have charged three suspects under severe sections of the law. Government gives WhatsApp 3 more days to reply to notice on username. NEW DELHI: Government has given WhatsApp three more days to respond to its notice over the messaging platform's proposed username feature. New rural employment scheme prioritises water security works. The new VB-G RAM G rural employment scheme prioritizes water security and disaster mitigation. This initiative aims to address potential El Nino-triggered rain deficiency situations. Gram panchayats can undertake projects for disaster preparedness and climate change challenges. States facing rainfall deficits must strengthen water conservation and prepare for employment generation. 'Participation fatigue' a growing concern for Gram Sabhas, says study. A new study highlights Gram Sabha participation fatigue, driven by unresolved grievances and lack of visible outcomes. Livelihood and time constraints significantly hinder public engagement in these local meetings. The report suggests launching awareness missions and livelihood-sensitive scheduling for better participation. Strengthening inclusive platforms will improve representation of women and vulnerable groups. Non-state actors from outside India overwhelming Kuki areas in Manipur, adding to violence: Ex-UNLF chief. Former UNLF chairman Rajkumar Meghen is in Delhi seeking a coalition for peace. He urges economic integration between Kuki and Meitei communities to build trust. Meghen suggests external forces are involved in the ongoing violence in the state. He claims the government has failed to build confidence and stop the conflict. Government to form cooperative life insurance company: Amit Shah. NEW DELHI: Union cooperation minister Amit Shah Monday announced a "cooperative life insurance company" will be formed and said the govt is also going to develop 'utility aggregator cooperative' in the coming days on the lines of 'Bharat Taxi' - India's first cooperative-led ride-hailing platform, reports Vishwa Mohan. J and K police search Samagra Shiksha office in Jammu, Noida publisher over 'anti-national' books. Police searched offices in Jammu and Noida as a probe into controversial books widened. Investigators are examining how inappropriate content reached government school libraries. Officials suspended eight education personnel after the books were withdrawn from circulation. The administration registered a case under stringent anti-terror laws. PM Narendra Modi's three-nation tour: Defence, critical minerals on table at India-Indonesia meeting today. While this is his fourth visit to Indonesia, it is the first bilateral visit since the elevation of ties to a Comprehensive Strategic Partnership in May 2018. 'Organisational committees valid until 2027': Mamata Banerjee faction to poll body over rebel group's claim on party. Speaking to reporters after submitting the response, TMC Lok Sabha member Kalyan Banerjee said the party filed a "very detailed reply" to the poll panel in response to a representation made by rebel group led by Ritabrata Banerjee. Goa may stop issuing new licences for rental Thars amid rising accidents. Citing concerns over the rising number of accidents, Goa Transport minister says the government is considering stopping new licences for rental Thars. Railways to run 300 special trains for Puri Rath Yatra, 100 for Onam in Kerala: Ashwini Vaishnaw. Indian Railways will operate 300 special trains for Puri Rath Yatra and 100 for Onam in Kerala to manage festive travel demand. Aerial 'joyride' over Patna at rupees 2,100 part of Bihar's major heli-tourism push. State announces subsidised air tourism network to connect iconic pilgrimage and wildlife hubs

transcript.title: Around the world
transcript.text: And finally, here is what is happening around the world. Trump confirms he asked Fifa to review Balogun ban. President Donald Trump confirms he asked Fifa to review United States striker Folarin Balogun's one-match suspension at the World Cup. Charlie Kirk's family attends hearing for suspect charged with his murder. Tyler Robinson, 23, is accused of murdering Kirk, a key Trump ally and founder of youth organisation Turning Point USA. Ex-Syrian intelligence chief found guilty of torture and sexual abuse by Austrian court. Two former Syrian officials went on trial in Vienna, Austria, accused of crimes against opponents of former Syrian leader Bashar al Huge crowds fill Tehran streets for Khamenei's funeral procession. Many people were waving Iranian flags and red banners symbolising vengeance for the former supreme leader's war death. More than 1,000 arrested as part of global human trafficking crackdown. Interpol says the vast majority of the 2,070 victims or potential victims identified were women being trafficked for sex. 'I ate ketchup and cheese,' says Venezuelan girl trapped under quake rubble for 32 hours. Fabiana was trapped in the rubble of a 10-storey residential building after two earthquakes rocked Venezuela in June. Sri Lanka prison riots leave 26 dead and more than 100 injured. The two days of violence at Negombo Prison are the worst prison riots in the country in years.

transcript.title: Sign-off
transcript.text: That is your briefing. Stay sharp, and have a strong day.
